ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol for the stock */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Full name of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector in which the company operates */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Specific industry of the company */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date the company went public */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the stock details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock associated with the data */,
  "data_date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" REAL /* Total trading volume of the stock on that day */,
  "macd" REAL /* Moving Average Convergence Divergence value (technical indicator) */,
  "rsi" REAL /* Relative Strength Index value (technical indicator) */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* Pre-market price of the stock */,
  "after_hours_price" REAL /* After-hours price of the stock */,
  "trading_status" TEXT /* Status of the stock (e.g., open, halted, closed) */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price (VWAP) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the market data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for user login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the firm */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each strategy */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user who created the strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the trading strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the strategy */,
  "criteria" TEXT /* Criteria or rules defined for the strategy */,
  "strategy_type" TEXT /* Type of strategy (e.g., technical, fundamental) */,
  "backtest_results" TEXT /* JSON column for storing backtest results */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the strategy was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_strategies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user who made the transaction */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the stock being traded */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the stock was traded */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of stocks traded */,
  "fee" REAL /* Transaction fee */,
  "commission" REAL /* Brokerage commission */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., pending, completed, cancelled) */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trading strategy used for the transaction */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES trading_strategies ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user who created the watchlist */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the stock being tracked */,
  "watchlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the watchlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the watchlist was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the watchlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user who created the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the stock the alert is related to */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price increase, price decrease) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Price threshold for the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was set */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered, dismissed) */,
  "triggered_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was triggered */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user associated with the permission */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource the permission is related to (e.g., stock data, transaction history) */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of permission (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the permission was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was logged */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., login, trade, report) */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user to whom the setting belongs */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting (e.g., theme, notification preferences) */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the setting was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_settings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
